a.xlink:title: Whether the drone is in flight.
Whether the drone is on a cable.
Whether the drone is on the ground.
Return the id of the cable that the drone is on if it is on a cable, -1 otherwise.
Get the cable gripper frame id.
Returns true if the history is empty.
Returns the single line adapter which is closest to the given position.
Get the altitude threshold for the drone to be considered landed.
